title: 🎰 Gambling System Guide
footer: Veyra • Gambling Help • Tip: Use /casino to buy/sell chips

pages.title: 🎰 Gambling Overview
pages.description:
Veyra gambling is a **risk-based minigame system** where you bet **Chips** to win more chips.

Important:
• Gambling uses **Chips**, not Gold
• Games are designed with **fair odds (EV ≈ 1)**

✨ Games include animations & result reveals for better game feel

Use this guide to learn:
✅ how chips work
✅ commands + format
✅ all games + their rules

fields.name: Core Currency
fields.value:
• **Gold**: main economy currency (jobs, quests, shop, marketplace)
• **Chips**: gambling-only currency (casino games)

To gamble, you need chips.

fields.name: Where to get Chips
fields.value:
Use `/casino` to:
• buy chips packs (Gold → Chips)
• cashout chips (Chips → Gold)

Chip offers rotate daily.

pages.title: ⌨️ Commands & Format
pages.description:
Gambling is played using **slash commands** for a cleaner UI.

**Format:**
`/gamble <game>`

Each game provides built-in options like bet amount and choices.

fields.name: Main Commands
fields.value:
• `/casino` - open casino shop (buy chips / cashout chips)
• `/gamble <game>` - play a casino game
• `/details gambling` - view this guide again

fields.name: Examples
fields.value:
• `/gamble flipcoin`
• `/gamble roulette`
• `/gamble slots`
• `/gamble dungeon`

fields.name: Bet Limits
fields.value:
Each game has a minimum and maximum bet.

If you bet too low / too high, the command will be rejected with the correct limits.

pages.title: 🪙 Game 1: Flip Coin
pages.description:
**Flip Coin** is a 50/50 gamble.

You pick **heads** or **tails**. If you guess right, your payout is **2x**.

fields.name: Command
fields.value:
`/gamble flipcoin`
Choose bet amount and Heads/Tails from options

fields.name: Valid Inputs
fields.value:
Heads/Tails are selectable via dropdown.
No typing required.

fields.name: Rules
fields.value:
• 50% chance win
• 50% chance lose

Outcomes:
✅ win → **2x payout**
❌ lose → lose your bet

fields.name: Bet Range
fields.value:
Min bet: **1** chip
Max bet: **5000** chips

pages.title: 🎡 Game 2: Roulette (0–9)
pages.description:
**Roulette** is a high-risk jackpot game.

You pick a number from **0 to 9**.
If it hits, payout is **10x**. Otherwise you lose the bet.

fields.name: Command
fields.value:
`/gamble roulette`
Choose bet amount and number (0–9)

fields.name: Rules
fields.value:
• Veyra rolls a number from **0 to 9**
• If your pick matches → **10x payout**
• If not → lose bet

fields.name: Invalid Input
fields.value: Number selection is restricted to 0–9 via UI options.

fields.name: Bet Range
fields.value:
Min bet: **10** chips
Max bet: **2500** chips

pages.title: 🎰 Game 3: Slots
pages.description:
**Slots** is the dopamine machine.

It spins 3 symbols. You can hit:
• **triple match** → big payout
• **pair match** → small payout
• no match → lose bet

fields.name: Command
fields.value:
`/gamble slots`
Choose bet amount

fields.name: Symbols (Weighted)
fields.value:
Slots are not equal chance.

So 🍒 appears most. 💎 is rare.

fields.name: Pair Match
fields.value:
Any pair (like 🍒🍒🍋) pays:
• **x1.66** multiplier

No match → lose bet.

fields.name: Bet Range
fields.value:
Min bet: **10** chips
Max bet: **2000** chips

pages.title: 🗡️ Game 4: Dungeon Raid
pages.description:
**Dungeon Raid** is an RPG-style gambling game.

You choose a dungeon area.
Each area has:
• a **death chance** (lose bet)
• a **treasure multiplier** (win payout)

Higher risk areas have bigger multipliers.

fields.name: Command
fields.value:
`/gamble dungeon`
Choose bet amount and dungeon area

fields.name: Valid Areas
fields.value:
Dungeon areas are selectable via dropdown.
Invalid selections are prevented by Discord UI.

fields.name: Areas, Risk & Multipliers
fields.value:
• **Safe Caves** → 20% death, **x1.20**
• **Goblin Tunnels** → 35% death, **x1.50**
• **Ancient Ruins** → 50% death, **x2.00**
• **Dragon Lair** → 70% death, **x3.33**
• **Abyss Gate** → 85% death, **x6.66**

fields.name: Rules
fields.value:
• Veyra rolls a random number
• If roll < death chance → you die 💀 and lose bet
• Else → you find treasure 🎁 and get payout = bet * multiplier

fields.name: Bet Range
fields.value:
Min bet: **10** chips
Max bet: **3000** chips
